Needed Realtime Feature: Live status updates on approvals/rejections and new uploads
Description of Fixes Needed: Ground staff and managers need instant feedback when an invoice changes state (e.g. approved by manager). Needs Supabase realtime subscription on `invoices` table.
Multiple staff members might update or consume inventory simultaneously. Without realtime stock levels will go out of sync causing bad orders. Needs realtime subscription on `inventory_items` table.

Needed Realtime Feature: Order status and vendor delivery updates
Description of Fixes Needed: When an order is accepted or fulfilled by a vendor the platform needs to update instantly so staff know stock is arriving. Needs realtime on `orders` table.
When a payment clears or fails through Stripe/external gateways the UI must reflect this instantly to prevent double-payments. Needs realtime on `payments` table.
When a vendor changes a price the product catalog should update in the UI without a manual refresh. Needs realtime on `products` table.

Needed Realtime Feature: Realtime for requests and organizations exists
Description of Fixes Needed: Currently uses `postgres_changes` for requests and orgs. Might need minor optimization but fundamentally works.
Already uses realtime to fetch new notifications in Layout. No major fixes needed.
Administrators should be able to watch audit logs stream in real-time during security investigations. Needs realtime on `audit_logs` table.
